creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
(In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #1)
You should look at the very first line of mail/spamassassin/pkg-plist. It's been there in one form or another since https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/mail/spamassassin/pkg-plist?annotate=134729

The commit log for r134729 does not state why it was put there in the first place.

While I was using portupgrade, I had this entry in /usr/local/etc/pkgtools.conf:
AFTERINSTALL = {
  'mail/spamassassin' => localbase() + '/etc/rc.d/sa-spamd start',
}

I really wish for a similar mechanism in /usr/local/etc/pkg.conf, but that's for another PR.
